description_long: This is a pair of black Chelsea boots with a matte finish, featuring elastic side panels in a contrasting gray color for easy slip-on access. The boots have a rounded toe and a robust, thick sole with a pronounced tread pattern for enhanced grip. Pull tabs are present at both the front and back of the ankle collar, aiding in putting the boots on. The upper material appears to be synthetic or treated leather, while the sole is likely made of durable rubber. The boots are designed for urban environments, offering both style and practicality. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A pair of black Chelsea boots with gray elastic side panels, pull tabs, and thick treaded rubber soles.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the rounded toe, front pull tab, and the smooth upper surface.
description_view_1: Bottom and side view highlighting the thick, lugged tread pattern on the sole and the side elastic panel.
description_view_2: Rear and top view displaying the back pull tab, heel, and the opening of the boots.
description_view_3: Side and front view emphasizing the elastic panel and the overall sleek silhouette of the boots.
